headline: Coinbase CEO has a radical fix for America's $36 trillion debt
summary: Brian Armstrong co-founded Coinbase (Nasdaq: COIN) in 2012 and turned it into the largest cryptocurrency exchange in the United States within a span of a few years. The billionaire, best known for aggressively pushing for clearer crypto regulation in Washington, doesn't shy away from voicing his ...

headline: Prediction: Coinbase Has Over 100% Upside as Cost Cuts and Volume Recovery Drive The Stock Higher
summary: Our Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) call is unabashedly constructive. Shares have been battered in 2026, but the setup into the back half of the year looks compelling if crypto volumes normalize and the cost-out plan sticks. The 24/7 Wall St. price target for Coinbase is $360.19 over the next 12 months, implying 117.66% upside from $165.48. Our ... headline: Trump executed 22,000 crypto trades in 2025
summary: Scott Melker discusses President Trump's crypto trading earnings after the president made more than 22,000 crypto trades in 2025. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.
